column.text:
• San Diego Padres designated outfielder Nick Castellanos for assignment.
• Los Angeles Angels traded catcher Austin Wynns to the Atlanta Braves for cash.
• Cincinnati Reds activated outfielder Noelvi Marte from the injured list.
• Los Angeles Angels transferred catcher Travis d'Arnaud to the 60-day injured list with right foot plantar fasciitis.
• Toronto Blue Jays transferred left-hander Joe Mantiply to the 60-day injured list with left knee inflammation.
• San Francisco Giants recalled right-hander Dylan Smith from Triple-A Sacramento River Cats.
• New York Mets recalled right-hander Joey Gerber from Triple-A Syracuse Mets.
• Toronto Blue Jays sent right-hander Yimi García on a rehab assignment to Dunedin Blue Jays.
• Houston Astros sent right-hander Cristian Javier on a rehab assignment to Double-A Corpus Christi Hooks.
• Toronto Blue Jays sent catcher Alejandro Kirk on a rehab assignment to Dunedin Blue Jays.
